name: Apache Celix Dev Container
postCreateCommand: conan install . --build missing --profile debug --options celix/*:build_all=True --options celix/*:enable_address_sanitizer=True --options celix/*:enable_testing=True --options celix/*:enable_ccache=True --options celix/*:enable_code_coverage=True --conf:build tools.cmake.cmaketoolchain:generator=Ninja --output-folder build && cmake --preset conan-debug -G Ninja
